payload.description: The current Medication Review: Dosage champion code is looser than the published SPM guideline and has a retrieval mismatch. The prompt allows SPM passes for medication-specific current-use/no-change confirmations that do not necessarily include dosage details, while the guideline still says the patient acknowledges or provides dosage details. The implementation also claims certain unchanged-regimen patterns count, but the transcript-window keywords do not cover several of those phrases, so the model may miss the very evidence it is told to credit. Decide whether to tighten code to the rubric or broaden the rubric to the code, and align retrieval keywords to the chosen rule.
payload.title: Align Medication Review Dosage SPM logic and retrieval with published rubric
